text: The provisions of this division, unless otherwise provided, apply to all vehicles, whether publicly or privately owned, when upon the highways.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 16. IMPLEMENTS OF HUSBANDRY [36000 - 36800]
### Chapter 8. General Provisions [36800- 36800.]
##### § 36800

The provisions of this division, unless otherwise provided, apply to all vehicles, whether publicly or privately owned, when upon the highways.

*(Added by Stats. 1963, Ch. 2149.)*
